title: dictyocline wilfordii
intro: Dictyocline wilfordii, also known as Dictamnus wilfordii, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, commonly found in mountainous regions. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to the presence of flavonoids and lignans. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, Dictyocline wilfordii is prepared as a tea or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
